race.comment: NAVY KISS (7) didn't do a bad job last start when fourth on debut over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly. Suited here and can get off the mark. MISHANI UNDERCOVER (12) improved last start but found a couple better over 1200m at Warwick, beaten just 2 lengths. Well placed to run top-three again. YELLOW CRATE (14) is a four-start maiden who could only manage to finish seventh at her latest appearance over 1350m at Ipswich. Rates highly in this field and can turn things around. ROTATE (19) has yet to find the frame in two runs since resuming from a spell, the latest effort a ninth over 1350m at Ipswich two weeks ago. Finds the right race and can feature.
